_comment: Species: Green Devil Scorpion (绿蝎) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Green Devil Scorpion

canonical.appearance: Armored scorpion 10 m long, carapace toxic green, stinger drips world-corroding venom
canonical.size: 10 m adult, 20000 jin; ancient 50 m, 500000 jin
canonical.behavior: Solitary apex predator of Green Devil Continent; venom can melt spirit-armor; cultivates by absorbing poison
canonical.habitat: Green Devil Continent, poison-aspected apex spirit veins
canonical.diet: poison-attribute herbs, weaker beasts, lost cultivators
canonical.relationships: Green Devil (N132) is its cultivator-master; apex of Green Devil Continent
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: green_devil_scorpion — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
